description: Template for indie game posts - comic book style with retro gaming elements

data.label: Style
data.name: Comic Ink + Retro Gaming
data.description: Heavy ink illustration. Bold black outlines, high contrast chiaroscuro with deep blacks and stark highlights. Cel-shaded shadows, graphic shapes. Muted palette with selective neon color pops (cyan, magenta). Hand-drawn comic book aesthetic with retro CRT glow influence. Influenced by Kirby and Moebius. NOT photorealistic. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Dark room with retro gaming setup, CRT monitors glowing, arcade machines in background, warm ambient lighting from screens

data.label: Action
data.content: [REPLACE: Describe the specific scene from the article]

data.label: Negative
data.content: photorealistic, photography, soft gradients, airbrushed, fedoras, 1940s detective imagery, film noir clichés, blurry, text, watermark, stock photo, over-rendered, plastic-looking
